name: @avatarsd-llc/libtracer-monorepo
description: npm workspace root for the libtracer TypeScript packages — the cross-validated core (@avatarsd-llc/libtracer) plus per-transport subpackages. See docs/adr/0033-npm-subpackage-monorepo.md.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @avatarsd-llc/libtracer && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
